Name: Spotify Now Playing
Description: Shows the current Spotify track (cover + title) and controls playback right from the Ulanzi Deck.

Actions.Name: Now Playing
Actions.Tooltip: Shows the cover art and title of the current track. Press to open Spotify.

Actions.Name: Now Playing (2x2 Mosaic)
Actions.Tooltip: One quadrant of the cover. Use four 2x2 keys to form the full image.

Actions.Name: Previous track
Actions.Tooltip: Goes back to the previous track.

Actions.Name: Volume (dial)
Actions.Tooltip: Adjust volume with the dial. Press to mute.

Actions.Name: Like
Actions.Tooltip: Likes or unlikes the current track. Shows ✓ when already liked.

Actions.Name: Playlist
Actions.Tooltip: Shortcut to play a playlist. Shows its cover art and name.

Actions.Name: Shuffle
Actions.Tooltip: Turns shuffle on/off. The icon shows the current state.

Actions.Name: Repeat
Actions.Tooltip: Cycles repeat: off → repeat all → repeat track.

Actions.Name: Mute
Actions.Tooltip: Mutes Spotify; press again to restore the previous volume.

Localization.Redirect URI (registre no app do Spotify: Redirect URI (register it in your Spotify app):
Localization.Coloque as 4 ações (um quadrante cada) e: Place the 4 actions (one quadrant each) on adjacent 2×2 keys to form the full cover.
Localization.Mostra a capa e o título da faixa atual: Shows the current Spotify track's cover and title, updating automatically.
Localization.Controle de playback do Spotify. Requer: Spotify playback control. Requires a Premium account and an active device.
Localization.Gire o dial para ajustar o volume; press: Turn the dial to adjust volume; press to mute/unmute. Requires Premium and an active device.
Localization.Aguardando login no navegador…: Waiting for login in the browser…
